ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا

ayahArabic: يٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ ٱلْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.'"

ayahEnglish: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا

ayahEnglish: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."

ayahArabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.

ayahArabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.

ayahArabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.

targetTranslation: take! (command to one male) (connected to الْكِتٰبَ)
ayahArabic: يٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O John, take the Scripture [i.e., adhere to it] with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy

ayahArabic: يٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "O John, take the Scripture [i.e., adhere to it] with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy

ayahArabic: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allāh

ayahArabic: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allāh

ayahArabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.

targetTranslation: a tyrant (object of يَكُن - was not)
ayahArabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.

ayahArabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.

ayahArabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

targetTranslation: he was born (on the day mentioned in يَوْمَ)
ayahArabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

ayahArabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

ayahArabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

ayahArabic: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.

targetTranslation: Mary (as the subject being mentioned in ٱذْكُرْ)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

targetTranslation: she withdrew herself (from أَهْلِهَا - her family)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

targetTranslation: a place (object of انتبذت - she withdrew to)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.

ayahArabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

ayahArabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

ayahArabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

targetTranslation: a human being (object of فَتَمَثَّلَ - appeared as)
ayahArabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

targetTranslation: in perfect human form (describing how رُوحَنَا appeared)
ayahArabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.

targetTranslation: she said (subject of إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ - 'Indeed I seek refuge')
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."

targetTranslation: righteous, pious (describing someone in the ayah)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

targetTranslation: a boy (object of لِأَهَبَ - to give)
ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

targetTranslation: a pure and blessed one (describing غُلٰمًا/child)
ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

targetTranslation: he is/will be (describing how غُلٰمٌ could exist)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

targetTranslation: a boy (subject of يَكُونُ - will be)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

targetTranslation: he touches me (in response to أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

targetTranslation: an unchaste woman (object of أَكُ in أَكُنْ)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahEnglish: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'"

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'"

targetTranslation: your Lord (feminine, subject of قَالَ - He said)
ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'"

ayahArabic: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا

ayahArabic: فَكُلِى وَٱشْرَبِى وَقَرِّى عَيْنًا فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِىٓ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا

ayahArabic: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.

targetTranslation: when (referring to يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ - Day of Regret)
ayahArabic: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.

ayahArabic: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

ayahEnglish: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.

targetTranslation: Abraham (as the object of اذْكُرْ - remember/mention)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا

ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

targetTranslation: when (referring to past time when he said to his father)
ayahArabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنكَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: [Mention] when he said to his father, "O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all?

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرٰطًا سَوِيًّا
ayahEnglish: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.

targetTranslation: what (that did not come to you)

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahEnglish: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطٰنِ وَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]."

targetTranslation: he touches you intensely (object of أَخَافُ أَن)

ayahEnglish: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يٰٓإِبْرٰهِيمُ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."

targetTranslation: Are you one who desires? (asking أنت/you)

ayahArabic: قَالَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [Abraham] said, "Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.

ayahEnglish: [Abraham] said, "Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.

ayahEnglish: [Abraham] said, "Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.

targetTranslation: he was (past tense, describing how Allah was with him)

targetTranslation: you (all) call (مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ - besides Allah)
ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

targetTranslation: perhaps/maybe (expressing hope about أَلَّآ أَكُونَ - that I will not be)
ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

targetTranslation: I am/will be (in relation to عَسَىٰٓ - 'perhaps')
ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

ayahArabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."

targetTranslation: he withdrew from them (subject of وَهَبْنَا)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

targetTranslation: a prophet (as the object of جَعَلْنَا/we made)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.

targetTranslation: very high/elevated (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made)
ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَنٰدَيْنٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنٰهُ نَجِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].

ayahArabic: وَنٰدَيْنٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنٰهُ نَجِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.

targetTranslation: a prophet (object of وَهَبْنَا - we granted)
ayahArabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِسْمٰعِيلَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِسْمٰعِيلَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِسْمٰعِيلَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا

ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].

targetTranslation: his family/household (as object of يَأْمُرُ - he commands)

ayahArabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا

ayahEnglish: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].

ayahArabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا

ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

targetTranslation: a prophet (as the object being described)
ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.

targetTranslation: a place (object of رَفَعْنٰهُ - we raised him)
ayahArabic: وَرَفَعْنٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We raised him to a high station.

ayahArabic: وَرَفَعْنٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And We raised him to a high station.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of خَرُّوا۟)
ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا

targetTranslation: Allah (The One True God) (subject of أَنْعَمَ - bestowed favors)
ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.

targetTranslation: after them (referring to the previous people mentioned)
ayahArabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَوٰتِ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا
ayahEnglish: But there came after them successors [i.e., later generations] who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -

ayahEnglish: But there came after them successors [i.e., later generations] who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been eminent.

targetTranslation: they hear/listen (referring to the people in Paradise)
ayahArabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلٰمًا وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahEnglish: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.

ayahArabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلٰمًا وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا

targetTranslation: that (pointing to something far away, feminine) (refers to الْجَنَّةُ)
ayahArabic: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahEnglish: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allāh.

ayahArabic: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذٰلِكَ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا
ayahEnglish: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -

ayahEnglish: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -

ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبٰدَتِهِۦ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبٰدَتِهِۦ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"

targetTranslation: you know (addressed to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبٰدَتِهِۦ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"

targetTranslation: a namesake/equal (in status to someone else)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبٰدَتِهِۦ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا

targetTranslation: is it when? (questioning what follows in مَا مِتُّ)
ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahEnglish: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"

ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

targetTranslation: We created him (referring to the human mentioned as الْإِنسٰنُ)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?

ayahArabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.

targetTranslation: Hell (as the object being surrounded in حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ)
ayahArabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.

targetTranslation: kneeling intensely (as the state they were brought in)
ayahArabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahEnglish: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عِتِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عِتِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.

ayahEnglish: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.

targetTranslation: more knowing (than the others mentioned in بِٱلَّذِينَ)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.

ayahEnglish: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.

targetTranslation: burning intensely (as a state or condition)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.

targetTranslation: the one arriving to it (subject of كَانَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.

ayahArabic: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا

targetTranslation: we rescue (those who were mindful of Allah)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا
ayahEnglish: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا

ayahEnglish: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.

targetTranslation: fallen on their knees (describing their state in Hell)

ayahEnglish: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.

targetTranslation: it is being recited (of آيَاتُنَا - our verses)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَىُّ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا
ayahEnglish: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association?"

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثٰثًا وَرِءْيًا
ayahEnglish: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثٰثًا وَرِءْيًا
ayahEnglish: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?

ayahEnglish: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?

ayahEnglish: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلضَّلٰلَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ مَدًّا حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers."

ayahArabic: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟ هُدًى وَٱلْبٰقِيٰتُ ٱلصَّالِحٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا

targetTranslation: have you seen? (asking about الَّذِى كَفَرَ - the one who disbelieved)
ayahArabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]"?

ayahEnglish: No! We will record what he says and extend [i.e., increase] for him from the punishment extensively.

ayahEnglish: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.

ayahArabic: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمْ عِزًّا
ayahEnglish: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.

ayahEnglish: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.

ayahEnglish: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.

targetTranslation: opponents (object of يَكُونُونَ - they will become)
ayahArabic: كَلَّا سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
ayahEnglish: No! They [i.e., those "gods"] will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement].

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
ayahEnglish: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them [to evil] with [constant] incitement?

ayahEnglish: You have done an atrocious thing.

targetTranslation: she/it is about to (subject of يَتَفَطَّرْنَ)
ayahArabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahEnglish: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

targetTranslation: they (feminine plural) break open (referring to السَّمٰوٰتُ)
ayahArabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahEnglish: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

targetTranslation: with a mighty crash (describing how تَخِرُّ/fall happens)
ayahArabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahEnglish: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

targetTranslation: they called (before لِلرَّحْمٰنِ - to the Most Merciful)
ayahArabic: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.

targetTranslation: a child/offspring (what they attributed to الرَّحْمٰنِ)
ayahArabic: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.

ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.

targetTranslation: a child/son (object of يَتَّخِذَ - to take)
ayahArabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahEnglish: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahEnglish: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahEnglish: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahEnglish: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.

ayahArabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahEnglish: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.

ayahArabic: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahEnglish: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.

targetTranslation: a counting (object of أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ - He has enumerated them and counted them)
ayahArabic: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahEnglish: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.

targetTranslation: will come to him (on يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Resurrection)
ayahArabic: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahEnglish: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.

targetTranslation: day (object of آتِيهِ - coming to Him)
ayahArabic: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahEnglish: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.

ayahArabic: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahEnglish: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.

targetTranslation: those who - connects descriptions to people or things
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.

targetTranslation: they believed (referring to those who in إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.

targetTranslation: deep love, affection (as the object being granted by الرَّحْمٰنُ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.

ayahArabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahEnglish: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.

ayahArabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahEnglish: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.

targetTranslation: extremely stubborn ones (object of وَتُنذِرَ - and you warn)
ayahArabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahEnglish: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًۢا
ayahEnglish: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًۢا
ayahEnglish: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?

ayahEnglish: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?
